summary: The alignment graph may proceed for internal dashboard/reporting and internal retrieval development/evaluation, but only named edge groups are reviewed graph knowledge. Whole-graph curriculum authority, student diagnostics, adaptive routing, student-facing AI, automatic mastery decisions, and summative assessment decisions remain blocked.
accepted_outcomes: The graph container and schema may exist.
Named approved edge groups may be treated as reviewed graph knowledge.
Source ranking may be used as a governance and ranking signal only.
Term-registry links may appear in the alignment graph.
Diagnostic quality edges may appear for reference health and review planning.
Internal retrieval development and retrieval evaluation may proceed when edge status and source authority are preserved.
blocked_outcomes: Do not treat the whole draft graph as pedagogically authoritative.
Do not use the graph for student diagnostics.
Do not use the graph for student adaptive routing.
Do not use the graph for student-facing AI tutor behavior.
Do not use the graph for automatic lesson sequencing.
Do not use the graph for automatic mastery decisions.
Do not use the graph for summative assessment decisions.

explicit_decisions.decision: Approve only named edge groups; unreviewed edges remain pending_review or diagnostic_only.
Use source_rank as governance/ranking signal only, not as proof or automatic approval.
Allow internal dashboard/reporting and internal retrieval development/evaluation; block student diagnostics, adaptive routing, and student-facing AI.

conditions_to_reopen_or_pass: Unreviewed edges must remain pending_review or diagnostic_only.
Generated-report edges must not be primary evidence.
Exam-question gap edges must remain diagnostic_only.
Retrieval must expose or preserve edge status and source authority.
D04 must be represented as a unit-design issue, not as a simple prerequisite edge.
D16 must carry both L10 and D34 prerequisite logic.
No student-facing diagnostics or adaptive routing may use the graph until a later diagnostic gate passes.
